name: Meta-Prompting Plugin
description: Compositional prompt engineering for Claude Code — chain commands, iterate with quality gates, extract context, and swap strategies. Inspired by category theory (functors, monads, comonads, natural transformations) but usable without the math.
author: Manu Tej <manutej@gmail.com>

skills.name: meta-self
skills.description: Master reference for meta-prompting unified syntax: modifiers, operators, composition patterns.

skills.name: recursive-meta-prompting
skills.description: RMP patterns with iterative refinement and quality convergence.

skills.name: quality-enriched-prompting
skills.description: [0,1]-enriched quality tracking and visualization across prompt pipelines.

skills.name: prompt-dsl
skills.description: Domain-specific language for composable prompt construction.

skills.name: prompt-benchmark
skills.description: Systematic prompt evaluation framework with MATH, GSM8K, Game of 24.

skills.name: categorical-property-testing
skills.description: Property-based testing for functor/monad laws using fp-ts and fast-check.

skills.name: polynomial-functors
skills.description: Spivak-Niu polynomial functor patterns for learner composition.

skills.name: cc2-research-framework
skills.description: Seven-function research workflow: Observe, Reason, Create, Orchestrate, Learn, Verify, Deploy.

skills.name: arxiv-categorical-ai
skills.description: Systematic analysis patterns for categorical AI research papers.

skills.name: dspy-categorical
skills.description: DSPy compositional prompt optimization (requires: pip install dspy).

skills.name: lmql-constraints
skills.description: LMQL constraint-guided generation (requires: pip install lmql).

skills.name: langgraph-orchestration
skills.description: LangGraph stateful multi-agent orchestration (requires: pip install langgraph).

skills.name: guidance-grammars
skills.description: Guidance library grammar-constrained generation (requires: pip install guidance).

skills.name: discopy-nlp
skills.description: DisCoPy string-diagram NLP (requires: pip install discopy).

skills.name: effect-ts-ai
skills.description: @effect/ai integration patterns for typed AI composition (requires: npm install @effect/ai).

skills.name: voltagent-multiagent
skills.description: VoltAgent multi-agent design patterns (requires: npm install voltagent).

skills.name: mcp-categorical
skills.description: MCP server patterns with typed tool composition.

functor.description: Structure-preserving task-to-prompt transformation with complexity tiering.

laws: Functor Composition: F(g . f) = F(g) . F(f)
Monad Left Identity: return >=> f = f
Monad Right Identity: f >=> return = f
Monad Associativity: (f >=> g) >=> h = f >=> (g >=> h)
Comonad Left Identity: extract . duplicate = id
Comonad Associativity: duplicate . duplicate = fmap duplicate . duplicate
Exception Catch Identity: catch(Right(a), h) = Right(a)
Exception Catch Error: catch(Left(e), h) = h(e)
Quality Monotonicity: quality(A (x) B) <= min(quality(A), quality(B))
